overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking along a dirt path through a sunlit pine forest. A rider on horseback passes by early in the clip, and the character later passes a dead wild boar beside the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded forest trail with tall pines

events.description: rider on white horse enters from left and passes by on the trail
horse and rider move ahead and fade into distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt forest path, observing surroundings

notable_agents.action: cowboy riding white horse passing by on the trail
white horse trotting along path with rider

entered.detail: dense forest of tall pine trees lining the path
reddish-brown dirt trail winding through forest

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a shaded dirt trail through a dense pine forest. A rider on a white horse enters from the left and passes by, continuing ahead down the path. Sunlight filters through the canopy creating dappled lighting on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit forest clearing with grassy patches

agents.ego_description: continuing along winding path through more open forest area

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along the trail as the forest opens into a sunnier clearing with tall grass. The path curves gently through the trees with rocky outcrops visible on the left hillside.

events.description: dead wild boar becomes visible on right side of path
character turns slightly left while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: walking past dead boar and surveying forest surroundings

notable_agents.action: dead wild boar lying on grass beside trail

entered.detail: dark-colored deceased wild pig lying on grassy ground
decaying tree trunk on forest floor

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a dead wild boar lying on the right side of the trail. The path continues through denser forest as the character walks onward, occasionally glancing around at the surroundings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt trail that transitions from a shaded pine forest into a bright clearing before returning to denser woods. It begins under a thick canopy where dappled sunlight hits the ground as a rider on a white horse passes by from the left. As the character proceeds, the forest opens into a sunnier clearing filled with tall grass and rocky outcrops along the left hillside. The scene then shifts back toward a more enclosed woodland as the character approaches and passes a dead wild boar lying on the right side of the trail. Finally, the camera continues forward through the thickening trees while the character occasionally glances at the surrounding wilderness.
